# growthbook_metric_group (Resource)

A GrowthBook metric group. Metric groups bundle an ordered set of metrics from a single data source so they can be reused together across experiments.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "growthbook_metric_group" "activation" {
  name        = "Activation metrics"
  description = "Core activation funnel metrics"
  datasource  = "ds_warehouse"
  metrics     = [growthbook_metric.signup.id]
  tags        = ["activation"]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `datasource` (String) ID of the data source backing the metric group.
- `metrics` (List of String) Ordered list of metric IDs that belong to the group.
- `name` (String) Human-readable metric group name.

### Optional

- `archived` (Boolean) Whether the metric group is archived.
- `description` (String) Optional description of the metric group.
- `owner` (String) User ID or email of the metric group owner.
- `projects` (List of String) Project IDs the metric group is scoped to.
- `tags` (List of String) Tags applied to the metric group.

### Read-Only

- `date_created` (String) Creation timestamp.
- `date_updated` (String) Last update timestamp.
- `id` (String) Unique metric group identifier (e.g. `mg_...`).
